_preamble: Whispr's current prototype uses a simplified, 3-rule constitution focused only on absolute objective harm. Subjective moderation is out-of-scope for this prototype.

principles.name: Non-Violence
principles.description: Messages must not contain credible threats of physical violence, instructions for causing bodily harm, or explicit incitement to commit violent acts against any person or group.

principles.name: Child Safety
principles.description: Absolute prohibition on any content that sexualizes, exploits, endangers, or facilitates abuse of minors.

principles.name: Anti-Harassment/Doxxing
principles.description: Messages must not engage in targeted harassment, sustained intimidation, doxxing, or coordinated bullying campaigns against individuals.
